title: Show HN: Avoiding the Memory Wall by computing LLM inference directly inside RAM
excerpt: The excitement surrounding PrismML’s 1-bit/ternary Bonsai models has the industry closely watching how smartphone giants, particularly Apple, will implement LLMs on edge devices. Moving AI on-device is a brilliant and necessary strategy. It ensures absolute user privacy in alignment with EU regulations, fundamentally shifts the economics away from costly cloud inference, and paves the way for a significant hardware upgrade supercycle as users seek true AI-capable silicon.
content_html:
The excitement surrounding PrismML’s 1-bit/ternary Bonsai models has the industry closely watching how smartphone giants, particularly Apple, will implement LLMs on edge devices. Moving AI on-device is a brilliant and necessary strategy. It ensures absolute user privacy in alignment with EU regulations, fundamentally shifts the economics away from costly cloud inference, and paves the way for a significant hardware upgrade supercycle as users seek true AI-capable silicon.

To create a smart on-device "Semantic Router," models need to reach the 27B+ parameter scale. Achieving this on a phone requires extreme quantization, such as PrismML’s ternary weights.

However, a critical hardware reality often overlooked by the software world is that fitting the weights in RAM is not equivalent to moving them. Running a 27B ternary model on standard LPDDR encounters a significant memory bandwidth limitation. Transferring gigabytes of data across the SoC bus for each token generation can lead to thermal throttling of the NPU and excessive battery drain.

This raises an important question: why are we still transferring data to the compute? Why not execute AI inference natively within the memory?

Frustrated with academic PIM simulations that overlook bare-metal physics, I developed CaSA, an architecture that performs ternary LLM inference directly inside COTS DRAM through charge-sharing, completely bypassing the memory bus.

Software quantization is a great initial step, and CaSA provides the physical hardware substrate needed to complete the bridge: https://github.com/pcdeni/CaSA

sentences.en: The excitement surrounding PrismML’s 1-bit/ternary Bonsai models has the industry closely watching how smartphone giants, particularly Apple, will implement LLMs on edge devices.
sentences.zh: PrismML 的 1 位/三元 Bonsai 模型令人兴奋，业界密切关注智能手机巨头（尤其是苹果）将如何在边缘设备上实施 LLM。

sentences.en: Moving AI on-device is a brilliant and necessary strategy.
sentences.zh: 将人工智能转移到设备上是一项出色且必要的策略。

sentences.en: It ensures absolute user privacy in alignment with EU regulations, fundamentally shifts the economics away from costly cloud inference, and paves the way for a significant hardware upgrade supercycle as users seek true AI-capable silicon.
sentences.zh: 它确保了绝对的用户隐私，符合欧盟法规，从根本上改变了成本高昂的云推理的经济性，并为用户寻求真正的人工智能芯片时的重大硬件升级超级周期铺平了道路。

blocks.html_en: To create a smart on-device "Semantic Router," models need to reach the 27B+ parameter scale. Achieving this on a phone requires extreme quantization, such as PrismML’s ternary weights.

sentences.en: To create a smart on-device "Semantic Router," models need to reach the 27B+ parameter scale.
sentences.zh: 要创建智能设备上的“语义路由器”，模型需要达到 27B+ 参数规模。

sentences.en: Achieving this on a phone requires extreme quantization, such as PrismML’s ternary weights.
sentences.zh: 在手机上实现这一目标需要极端的量化，例如 PrismML 的三元权重。

Running a 27B ternary model on standard LPDDR encounters a significant memory bandwidth limitation. Transferring gigabytes of data across the SoC bus for each token generation can lead to thermal throttling of the NPU and excessive battery drain.

sentences.en: However, a critical hardware reality often overlooked by the software world is that fitting the weights in RAM is not equivalent to moving them.
sentences.zh: 然而，软件世界经常忽视的一个关键硬件现实是，将权重装入 RAM 并不等于移动它们。

sentences.en: Running a 27B ternary model on standard LPDDR encounters a significant memory bandwidth limitation.
sentences.zh: 在标准 LPDDR 上运行 27B 三进制模型会遇到显着的内存带宽限制。

sentences.en: Transferring gigabytes of data across the SoC bus for each token generation can lead to thermal throttling of the NPU and excessive battery drain.
sentences.zh: 每次代币通过 SoC 总线传输千兆字节的数据可能会导致 NPU 的热节流和电池过度消耗。

blocks.html_en: This raises an important question: why are we still transferring data to the compute? Why not execute AI inference natively within the memory?

sentences.zh: 这就提出了一个重要的问题：为什么我们仍然将数据传输到计算？

sentences.en: Why not execute AI inference natively within the memory?
sentences.zh: 为什么不在内存中本地执行人工智能推理？

blocks.html_en: Frustrated with academic PIM simulations that overlook bare-metal physics, I developed CaSA, an architecture that performs ternary LLM inference directly inside COTS DRAM through charge-sharing, completely bypassing the memory bus.

sentences.en: Frustrated with academic PIM simulations that overlook bare-metal physics, I developed CaSA, an architecture that performs ternary LLM inference directly inside COTS DRAM through charge-sharing, completely bypassing the memory bus.
sentences.zh: 由于对忽视裸机物理的学术 PIM 模拟感到失望，我开发了 CaSA，这是一种通过电荷共享直接在 COTS DRAM 内部执行三元 LLM 推理的架构，完全绕过内存总线。

blocks.html_en: Software quantization is a great initial step, and CaSA provides the physical hardware substrate needed to complete the bridge: https://github.com/pcdeni/CaSA

sentences.en: Software quantization is a great initial step, and CaSA provides the physical hardware substrate needed to complete the bridge: https://github.com/pcdeni/CaSA
sentences.zh: 软件量化是一个很好的初始步骤，CaSA 提供了完成桥梁所需的物理硬件基础：https://github.com/pcdeni/CaSA

content_html_zh:
PrismML 的 1 位/三元 Bonsai 模型令人兴奋，业界密切关注智能手机巨头（尤其是苹果）将如何在边缘设备上实施 LLM。 将人工智能转移到设备上是一项出色且必要的策略。 它确保了绝对的用户隐私，符合欧盟法规，从根本上改变了成本高昂的云推理的经济性，并为用户寻求真正的人工智能芯片时的重大硬件升级超级周期铺平了道路。

要创建智能设备上的“语义路由器”，模型需要达到 27B+ 参数规模。 在手机上实现这一目标需要极端的量化，例如 PrismML 的三元权重。

然而，软件世界经常忽视的一个关键硬件现实是，将权重装入 RAM 并不等于移动它们。 在标准 LPDDR 上运行 27B 三进制模型会遇到显着的内存带宽限制。 每次代币通过 SoC 总线传输千兆字节的数据可能会导致 NPU 的热节流和电池过度消耗。

这就提出了一个重要的问题：为什么我们仍然将数据传输到计算？ 为什么不在内存中本地执行人工智能推理？

由于对忽视裸机物理的学术 PIM 模拟感到失望，我开发了 CaSA，这是一种通过电荷共享直接在 COTS DRAM 内部执行三元 LLM 推理的架构，完全绕过内存总线。

软件量化是一个很好的初始步骤，CaSA 提供了完成桥梁所需的物理硬件基础：https://github.com/pcdeni/CaSA
